source: University of Notre Dame Global Affairs

news.title: Statement from University President Rev. Robert A. Dowd, C.S.C., in support of Pope Leo XIV
news.summary_en: “Pope Leo XIV continues to proclaim the Gospel of Christ by upholding human dignity and serving as a tireless advocate for peace. His message transcends partisan political divisions in this or any country and I’m deeply grateful for Pope Leo’s inspiring example. I ask members of the Notre Dame community...
